checks.description: Artifact matches the approved source profile and analysis purpose.
Artifact contains no personal data, confidential data, internal URLs, private paths, credentials, tokens, secrets, or production configuration.
Each extracted item includes at least one source reference or is marked for clarification.
Artifact clearly states that human review is still required.
Artifact is safe to use as an approved decision record.
checks.reason: The artifact is reviewable but not approved. A human reviewer must accept, correct, or reject the extracted items.

required_next_step: Route to human reviewer before publication, escalation, or downstream action.
